description: The Set Speed node tells a IPlayable to playback at a specific speed upon impulse.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]):
=== Target (IPlayable) ===

The IPlayable to set the position on.
fields.Speed: Set the speed of the playback on the target. 1 is equivalent to x1.0.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after the initial call.
